reviews.name: Amira Najwa Nordin
reviews.text:
You would have to make appointment first, and the service were good. Convenient parking space.

Came to see Dr. Shaifa and Laila for minor surgery. Both were nice and the surgery went smooth with clear explanations from the Doctor.

reviews.name: Jbs ees
reviews.text:
I needed two sets of fillings but my inner jaw tooth was giving too much pain and this actually was a problem tooth.
The lady dentist gave me a few options and was so humble and professional at her advice in solving my tooth problem. She managed to extract and also did the filling to finish 2 jobs.
I am very satisfied today with the treatment here at selcare shah alam and would like to Thank the staff and the super dentist for their patience and professional attention given to me.
The best part I noticed
the staff cleaning every equipment with a clean disposable sterile cloth after finishing work on my mouth.
Super 👌

reviews.name: Aishah Sha
reviews.text: Jumpa dengan Dr Norsyaifa memang sgt bagus dan lembut orgnya. Dia check gigi dan scaling gigi pun lembut dan takde kasar2 pun. Byk bagi nasihat dan bagi free ubat gigi.😬

reviews.name: Nurul Aina Samsuri
reviews.text: Sangat puas hati dengan experience saya di klinik ni. Doktor2 serta assistant2 dekat klinik ni sangat baik, peramah, dan friendly sangat2 taw hehe. Dari awal consult until pemasangan braces, mereka terangkan setiap proses dengan jelas dan membuatkan saya rasa selesa serta tak nervous. Staff lain juga sangat membantu dan mesra. Klinik bersih, servis tip-top, dan pengalaman pertama memakai braces menjadi sangat smooth. Memang highly recommended lah! 🤭🫶🏻

reviews.name: hani
reviews.text:
Do not be fooled by this clinic. SCAMMERS.

The female staff at the front desk is very rude, and their charges change without any reasonable explanation. They should have a specific and fixed price list based on the treatment provided, just like other clinics. Instead, the prices can be changed at will with no clear ceiling rate.

This is ridiculous. Initially, I was informed that the treatment would cost around RM4,000+, and after paying a RM250 deposit, the estimated cost suddenly increased and could reach as high as RM10,000.

When I decided to cancel, they refused to refund the deposit. Enjoy your ill-gotten money. It seems like you've been deceiving people for a long time. I hope this business goes bankrupt soon.

reviews.name: Seri Aini Assyikin
reviews.text:
DOCTOR OK TAPI STAFF DEKAT KAUNTER TERPALING PEGAWAI..
Nak cakap Alah Kadar je (Staff Perempuan Melayu pakai tudung)
Tahu penat.. Tapi kerja kan?

reviews.name: laavanya arumugam
reviews.text:
This is my 1st time going to the clinic and I got bad experience.during scaling I I had stop halfway due to the injury below my tongue , and only halfway scaling was done and no polishing was done but the charges were for scaling and polishing although I didn’t proceed for polishing . When I clarified regarding this the receptionist he told the charges is still included which I feel ridiculous.

The dentist was even concern regarding charges after the injury he didn’t even apologize and he told you’ll be still charged and you need to pay the amount for scaling . No empathy at all

should trained the Dentist on techniques on scaling …I’ve been for so many scaling and this is the first time I got injured ,And training should be given to the front desk on how to handle this kind of situations .

reviews.name: Annissa Yasmine
reviews.text: good service friendly doctor and staff

reviews.name: Admin Cosmetics
reviews.text: Good service, doctor and staff friendly, and follow request dari patient 🫡

reviews.name: Alyssa Sofea
reviews.text:
Sangat rude! Memang appoitment pukul 430pm plus ni first time i datang tapi masa register dia buat muka penat malas nak layan even lps isi borang dia biar kn aku tercegat situ lama! Takde suruh duduk dlu ke apa. Bila tanya tunggu apa ni dia buat tak tahu and kawan sebelah dia yang bgtahu suruh duduk dlu sementara tunggu dr! Kawan i pun dia layan sngt rude, Kalau taknak keje xyah keje! Layan cust mcm xde duit pulak! Sumpah ni last i datang sini, she so rude to cust pls do something!

16th Dec 25
How do you know that I was unhappy the moment I entered the clinic? My facial expression is naturally like that, and it was also very hot outside.

I did not expect your staff to immediately know who I was. I entered the clinic because I was looking for my friend, as he texted me to meet him inside. That is why, if you review the CCTV again, you will see that I was on my phone texting him first before approaching the counter.

When I sat on the chair, I was already called shortly after. I clearly remember that I was the last customer at that time, and of course your staff would have expected me since my friend had already registered an appointment under my name as well.

I hope you will not be quick to judge a customer without understanding both sides of the story — as you mentioned yourself, there are always two sides.

When I approached the counter, your staff already appeared visibly unhappy and unwilling to answer my questions properly. Is this how customers are supposed to be treated?

It is unfair to respond publicly based solely on your staff’s account without first hearing my side of the story.

reviews.text: Brought my 2 year old for her first dental checkup to Dr Nolan. She was not afraid at all as Dr Nolan made her feel soo comfortable. No crying at all and she followed all his instructions well. Dr Nolan really knows how to handle a toddler and at the same time give the best treatment for my girl. At the end he surprised her with a animal balloon which really made her day.  I am very happy with the service provided by Dr Nolan and will definitely recommend him to all my friends and family:)

reviews.text: We had such a wonderful experience at this clinic! I brought my kids in yesterday and although they were very nervous at first, the dentist and staff were amazing at making them feel comfortable. The team interacted so well with the children, and the dentist went the extra mile by making them balloon swords, which really made their day. My kids left with big smiles and actually said they love the dentist now! Thank you for giving us such a pleasant and positive experience. Highly recommended!

reviews.text:
Datang sni sebab nmpk iklan promo whitening.
layanan doktor 4/5 (doktor buat keja laju tapi x kasar)
layanan nurse pembantu 4/5 (sbb sy xdgr sgt arahan nurse ckp laju)
layanan staff kaunter 5/5
suasana klinik 5/5 memang cantik dan kemas, ad surau dan tandas, tempat duduk yg ckup dan selesa.
treatment 5/5 gigi sy jadi cerah 3 tone ! wlaupun promo tapi doktor dan nurse buat treatment full dan berkualiti.
overall recommended !
oh ya payment method pun ada banyak. mudah sgt.

reviews.text: Service good & fast. Never wait more then 15minute. Doctor & staff very helpful, clinic always clean & comfortable. Highly recommended to everyone.

reviews.name: D I R A Kamarudin
reviews.text:
Layanan yang sangat baik dan professional dari semua staff terutama sekali DR. Naim

Sebelum ni saya telah memilih ke klinik lain untuk membuat bracess, layanan  yg  saya dapat tidak memuaskan. Temujanji seterusnya pun agak lambat. Kemudian, saya ternampak tawaran harga untuk bracess yang ditawarkan oleh Medissa teramat murah  berbanding klinik lain yang saya da survey sebelum ni. Admin reply sangat cepat dan aturkan temujanji. Datang untuk consult bracess keesokan nya terus buat pemasangan. Jimat masa, jimat duit layanan pun sangat memuaskan.

Lagi satu, saya suka dengan persekitaran klinik. Sangat bersih dan aesthetic. Alhamdulillah dipermudahkan . Terima Kasih team Medissa. Semoga Allah merahmati setiap kebaikan yang anda buat .

street: No. 18 Ground Floor, Jalan Plumbum N7/N

title: Klinik Pergigian Maju
address: No 30 (tingkat bawah, Jalan E 24 E, Seksyen 24, 40300 Shah Alam, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: zain aziz
reviews.text:
Antara beberapa klinik gigi di Shah Alam yang dibuka sehingga jam 10 malam.

Mesra OKU dan kerusi roda. Ada ruang bermain untuk anak kecil. Ada air minum percuma.

Pernah jumpa doktor Azri, Doktor Shawal, dan Doktor Sasa.  Semua merawat teliti dan lembut (gentle). Pengalaman scaling yang paling rendah sakitnya. Pernah bawa ibu mertua buat gigi palsu 6 tahun lepas, masih dipakai dan tiada komplen. Konsultasi pada sebelum dan selepas rawatan juga menyeluruh.

Setiap kali datang jururawat dan doktor akan pesan, untuk datang kembali jika ada apa-apa masalah susulan rawatan mereka. Tafsiran saya, mereka ada matlamat peribadi (personal goal) untuk merawat setiap pesakit dengan sebaiknya.

Kudos Klinik Gigi Maju. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Hani Ali
reviews.text: Visiting the dentist can be a daunting experience and I felt anxious before my appointment. However, the dentist was extremely gentle and took the time to explain everything, which calmed my nerves. The treatment was conducted professionally and was surprisingly budget-friendly for a specialist. The staff was attentive and ensured I felt cared for during my visit. The clinic provided refreshments and snacks while I waited and although there was a small designated prayer area, it was kept clean and tidy, it definitely met all my convenience needs. Overall, it was a positive experience that was well worth the price! I highly recommend it!

reviews.name: Sarah Mazhar Iqbal Khan
reviews.text:
Update :

Dr Syaheerah and team reach out to me after seeing my review. I appreciate their effort in rectifying my issue. I know Dr Syaheerah acted in good faith and means no harm. Alhamdulillah she removed my temporary filling and did the permanent filling, she was very gentle, and use numbing gel plus local anaesthesia which help with the pain level for the procedure. She also entertained all our quiries and worries calmly and patiencely.

Hopefully I won't need further treatment, especially root canal. It's too soon to tell but I can only pray ❤️🤲

Went in for scaling. Dr Syahirah saw me and she was very good with the scaling. After done scaling, she did a check up of my teeth, and show me some of the holes, and offer to do filling.
I thought it will be a simple procedure.

Unfortunately I was ill informed. 1st she only showed me on which teeth I have the holes but didn't show me the real picture of the hole on those teeth. I didn't really know how my teeth looks prior to the procedure, since it is on the upper teeth molars.

When she started the process I didn't know that it requires drilling and removing some of the decay inside of the tooth 😭 by end of the drilling she informed me the decay is deeper and by end of the procedure the hole is big as she shows me on the screen and I can literally feel the hole with my tongue.
She said I might need root canal, my heart drop 😭 I wish I didn't agreed to the the procedure in the first place. My tooth was not even infected it was decay yes according to the doc. She suggest to put a temporary filling, which was 100 each tooth, that would only last for weeks.

Now I have to get 2nd opinion, and to look for permanent filling, root canal or extractions.

I'm upset because I went in for simple procedure but ended up worst 370 ringgit later. The whole night I couldn't sleep because I regret doing the procedure. Now I feel tingling on the tooth, I hope I can get it properly filled before it get infected since now the hole are bigger and can be exposed anytime if the permanent filling falls out.

Scaling and service are good
But the rest, unfortunately no 😢
Make sure you are well informed  before getting your teeth drilled.

reviews.name: Noor Sakina
reviews.text:
My son had filling treatment with dr syaheerah(second visit) and the experience exceeded our expectations. She was gentle, professional, and attentive throughout the visit. She always make sure that my son is okay and comfortable. What stood out most was how thoroughly she explained every step of the treatment and used camera to show us picture every step of the procedure. This level of transparency helped us better understand the treatment and appreciate the results.
My son was very nervous when he first came to the clinic. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a dentist that is good with kids

reviews.text:
I have always been very fearful of dental treatments, but Dr. Tan is the only dentist I truly trust. He is gentle, caring, highly skillful, plus his offers very reasonable and affordable prices.
I had a major procedure done where 8 teeths were removed and 4 implants were placed all in the same day. The surgery took about 5.5 hours to complete. , but surprisingly the next day I experienced no pain or swelling at all.That just shows how amazing Dr. Tan is at what he does.
He truly makes the experience comfortable and with no fear. If you’re like me and have a phobia of dentists, I highly recommend Pergigian T3 -Dr. Tan Yue Hau and his team ,You’ll be in safe hands! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.name: Amira Saryati
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I had a great experience at this dental clinic. The place is very clean, comfortable, and welcoming, which made every visit pleasant.

The dentist is highly professional and meticulous. During my scaling appointment, he thoroughly checked every tooth and clearly explained any areas that showed early signs of decay or needed attention. I really appreciated that he was informative without being pushy about doing further treatment with him.

On my second visit, I had a filling done, and I was genuinely impressed by the quality of the work. The filling was done with great attention to detail and blended so seamlessly with my natural tooth that I could barely tell the difference.

Overall, I highly recommend this clinic for anyone looking for honest, skilled, and professional dental care.

reviews.name: Shadow Tan
reviews.text:
The tooth was out before my son even knew what happened!
A huge thank you to the dentist for making my son's first tooth extraction such a calm and stress-free experience!
Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Laura W
reviews.text:
No joke it's painless for my teeth extraction.

Felt reassured knowing that Dr Max is proactively in his practice field, joining ton of workshop/conference and his expertise is undoubtedly excellent.

Extraction was quick, painless and with reassurance during the procedure.

Strongly recommend to anyone look for good dental experience and with reasonable price.

reviews.name: Misz Gie
reviews.text: Scaling here feels different from other places. The dentist uses a gentle technique but still very effective. Gums didn’t feel sore after.

reviews.name: Cheryl Leong
reviews.text: Dr Max is very friendly and puts the patient at ease. His memory is superb and can even remember patient's teeth condition from previous visit. Not only that, he is so hardworking that he works 7 day week, without taking any day off. His charges are standard, so no worries of overpriced fee. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Yoonchin Siow
reviews.text: 这间牙医的医生都很细心讲解问题，洗牙拔牙都不会疼。

reviews.text: Had a filling done and the dentist made sure it felt natural before finishing. Service was quick but not rushed.

reviews.name: Hasrul Ealmi Hj Hamzah
reviews.text: Brought my sibling here for braces and now I’m considering aligners myself. Good experience overall. Dentist and staff both are professional and friendly

reviews.text: Klinik bersih, selesa dan mesra kanak kanak. Harga sgt berbaloi dgn rawatan yg diterima, sgt memuaskan hati. Boleh dtg semula ❤️ thankyou Aidentist!

reviews.name: Nunu Hidayah
reviews.text:
First time datang ke Aidentist untuk scaling, polish, and filling.
Doctor explain everything clearly and even show X-ray before & after treatment. Dr. Lim very friendly, clinic pun selesa, staff semua gentle, terus hilang nervous.
Will definitely come again for regular check-up!

reviews.name: Ann “Ann” Mansor
reviews.text: I underwent veneer treatment today with Dr. Aznan, and the experience was exceptional. My teeth now look greatly improved, and I am able to smile with renewed confidence. I would like to express my sincere appreciation to Dr. Aznan and his dedicated team for their outstanding care and professionalism.

reviews.name: Dalila Nadira
reviews.text: First time doing scaling at Aidentist Setia Alam, and it was such a pleasant experience! Dr. Firdaus (hope I got the name right 🙏🏻) was very gentle with both my husband and me — we didn’t feel any pain at all throughout the procedure. He also took the time to explain the general condition of our teeth before starting and again after the session ended. Really appreciate his patience and professionalism. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: chiu siewpeng
reviews.text: Had my tooth filling done by Dr Lim today. She was very gentle and professional throughout the procedure. I really appreciate how she took the time to explain each step and made me feel at ease. The clinic staff were also very kind and welcoming. Great experience overall! 😃👍👍👍

reviews.name: lola bunny
reviews.text: Friendly doc and nurse but not a good experience for tooth extraction.

reviews.name: Huiying Neo
reviews.text:
I booked my appointment one month in advance, but when I arrived at the clinic this morning, I was told that my appointment had not been registered in their system. The staff then asked if I could come back at a later time.

This was extremely disappointing and a complete waste of my time. Although I was eager to proceed with the treatment, this experience created a very poor first impression. If a clinic cannot manage something as basic as an appointment booking, it makes me question the reliability of their services. Unfortunately, I no longer feel confident proceeding with any treatment here.

reviews.name: Fiona Ho
reviews.text: Had a great experience here! Dr. Ng was incredibly patient in explaining my condition and took the time to answer all my questions. The treatment was excellent! Thank you so much, Dr. Ng, for your professionalism and kindness. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Aina Naim
reviews.text: Went for scaling, good service from Dr. Ng. She explained everything clearly throughout the process.

reviews.name: ns syahida
reviews.text: Another great visit to Stellar Dental. As always, excellent service from the team, and Dr. Alyssa provided a thorough explanation of my treatment progress. Thank you for making every visit a pleasant one. Highly recommended! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.name: nur baizura
reviews.text: Thank you Dr Goh & Dr Alisya for the good services

reviews.name: deyana deana
reviews.text: thank you , my 4th year with this dental.

reviews.name: Louise Iosua
reviews.text:
A visitor to MH, I booked an appt with Stellar for a ‘sore tooth’ as they were near my accommodation.
Dr Din and co, checked it and after his consultation had cleaning and x-ray done also.
Was a pleasant surprise of cost compared back home and quality of care and service. I would recommend them highly as who likes going to a dentist? You’re the best so far for me. Thank you. 5 days later and still all good 👍.

reviews.name: Azman Faris
reviews.text:
Had a wonderful experience with Dr. Alyssa and the staff. She explained the scaling and whitening process very clearly, and also gave me tips on how to best take care of my newly whitened teeth. Prices are a bargain for the service provided. Would highly recommend coming here.

22/6/26 Update: Came again because I had swelling in my gums and it had become quite painful to chew. Dr. Alyssa attended to me once more and, just like my previous visit, she was incredibly gentle, patient, and professional throughout the treatment. She took the time to thoroughly explain what was causing the issue, the treatment options available, and what I could expect during the recovery process.

What I appreciated most was how reassuring she was. Dental visits can be stressful when you’re already in pain, but she made the entire experience comfortable and put me at ease from the moment I sat in the chair. The treatment was carried out carefully and efficiently, and she also provided clear aftercare advice to help prevent the issue from recurring.

The staff were friendly and accommodating as always, and the overall level of care was excellent. It’s rare to find a dentist who combines technical skill with such a gentle and caring approach. I’m very glad I chose this clinic and would not hesitate to return again. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a trustworthy and attentive dentist.

reviews.name: Ishea
reviews.text: Nice environment, good staff support.

reviews.name: Nor Aisha Shakilla
reviews.text: Klinik yg trbaik pernah sy pergi.. staff n Dr Haziq pon baik lemah lembut.
